enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Puriya Villai?

The song conveys themes of energy and excitement, reflecting the vibrant spirit of the movie Singam 2.

How does Puriya Villai fit into the plot of Singam 2?

This song enhances the action sequences, showcasing the protagonist's determination and vigor.

Who is the singer of Puriya Villai?

The song is sung by the talented Shweta Mohan.

Who composed the music for Puriya Villai?

The music was composed by Devi Sri Prasad, known for his energetic and catchy tunes.

When was Puriya Villai released?

The song was released on June 2, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Puriya Villai, the protagonist's vibrant energy is captured through an upbeat melody that resonates with the action-packed narrative of Singam 2. The song showcases the determination and spirit of the characters, making it a perfect anthem for celebration and motivation. With Shweta Mohan's powerful vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic composition, it evokes feelings of excitement and enthusiasm. This track is not just a song; it's an experience that elevates the overall vibe of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Puriya Villai from Singam 2 is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of action and excitement. With Shweta Mohan's powerful vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic composition, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the vibrant beats and let the energy of this song elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: This is not understandable, this is not understandable... The heart starts to feel from the beginning, why is this not understandable?
Your memory is not hidden, it cannot be concealed near me. I see in my eyes, there is no reason for it to fall from the sky, until now it has not been like this.
This is not understandable, this is not understandable... The heart starts to feel from the beginning, why is this not understandable?
When I wake up in the morning, my dreams are not complete. Even if the evening fades, the memories do not disappear.
Friend, you are not a companion, you are not a friend. There is no old speed in talking, there are no words at all.
This is not understandable, this is not understandable... The heart starts to feel from the beginning, why is this not understandable?
In the gentle rain, the body does not feel warmth. Today, there are no shadows among the trees.
There are no two feet on the ground, time does not change, there is nothing in the wind to desire.
